name: Black Forest Brownie Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine butter, chocolate, sugar, egg, milk, and vanilla in a bowl. Beat well.
2. Add flour and nuts; beat until combined.
3. Spread batter into the prepared crust.
4. Bake at 350°F for 18-20 minutes, or until the top looks dry and feels firm when gently touched.
5. Cool completely, then spread frosting over the top.
6. When frosting is cool, transfer cherries from the can to the top of the dessert with a slotted spoon.
1. Finely crush chocolate wafers to make 1 1/4 cups crumbs. Pour into a 9-inch pie pan. Mix with 3 tablespoons melted butter or margarine and press firmly over the bottom and up the sides of the crust.
2. Bake at 350°F for 8-10 minutes, until darker brown at the rim.
3. Cool completely before serving.
4. In a small saucepan over low heat, stir chocolate chips with whipping cream just until smooth. Use warm mixture as frosting.
